projects.p1Desc: Complete architectural overhaul for a fintech data provider. Redesigned the user interface to boost processing speed by 400%.
projects.p2Desc: Seamless Web3 onboarding experience design. We removed complexity to create an easy path for new crypto users.
projects.p3Desc: E-commerce platform optimization resulting in a 35% increase in conversion rate. Custom headless Shopify architecture with Sanity CMS.
